title: Skill Security Scan Override Artifact
description: Frontmatter schema for knowledge-base/security/skill-overrides/YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.md. The artifact alone is the audit-trail; no git trailer is involved (squash-merge-safe).

skill.description: Skill slug. Lowercase + hyphens only; rejects regex meta-chars to prevent bash interpolation hazards in filename matching.

source.description: URL or 'skill-creator' (where the skill content originated).

findings_json.description: Inline JSON copy of the .scan-meta.json findings_summary at override time, or a path string referencing the .scan-meta.json file.

justification.description: Free-text rationale explaining why the operator accepts the HIGH-RISK or REVIEW verdict.

approver.description: git config user.email of the operator approving the override.

scanner_version.description: Semver of the scanner at override time.

rule_pack_sha256.description: SHA-256 (or sha-prefix ≥8 chars) of the rule-pack manifest at override time. Mismatch with current manifest indicates stale findings; operator must re-run scanner and update the artifact.

verdict.description: Verdict the operator is overriding. LOW-RISK never requires an override.
